summary: Validated SpooledTemporaryFile + StreamingResponse refactor of POST /api/admin/documents/export-zip. ALL backend tests pass: 7 pre-existing pytest cases (auth, all candidates, MARIA CPF filter -> 2 files, ANA Passaporte CPF filter -> 1 file, inexistent CPF -> 404, tipo=RG, unknown tipo -> 404) + 4 NEW streaming-focused pytest cases (no Content-Length header / Transfer-Encoding chunked, ZIP valid when read iter_content in 8KB chunks, tipo=CNH returns only JOAO CNH with X-Total-Candidates=1, cpfs=[JOAO] returns 2 CNH files). Frontend Playwright (real browser, public URL): login OK, Documentos tab loads, 'Baixar Todos (ZIP)' downloaded ZIP with 5 entries (3 candidatos) integrity OK, selecting ANA + 'Baixar selecionados (ZIP)' downloaded ZIP with exactly 1 entry (Passaporte_frente.png) integrity OK. Refactor preserved behavior 100% and streaming confirmed (Content-Length absent / Transfer-Encoding: chunked).
critical_code_review_comments: admin_routes.py L968: SpooledTemporaryFile(max_size=50MB) is appropriate for the stated load (98MB ZIP @ 103 cadastros). For 10x growth consider lowering rollover to 10MB to free RAM sooner; current 50MB still spools to disk above threshold so it remains safe.
Streaming chunk size of 64KB (L1026) is a reasonable trade-off. No issues.
Memory cleanup: explicit `del raw` and `del doc, fd` is defensive but not strictly necessary since each iteration's variables go out of scope; leaving as-is is fine.
spool.close() is called in chunk_iter()'s finally — verified the temp file is cleaned up properly when the StreamingResponse completes or the client disconnects.
Pre-flight `find_one` (L963-965) duplicates query work but is cheap (only fetches _id) and avoids opening the spool file unnecessarily — good pattern.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Baixar Todos + Baixar selecionados both downloaded valid ZIPs)

seed_data_creation: None — used pre-existing seeded CPFs (11111111101 MARIA RG frente+verso, 22222222202 JOAO CNH frente+verso, 33333333303 ANA Passaporte frente). No data created or deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor RAM->SpooledTemporaryFile + StreamingResponse is fully validated. Streaming verified via requests stream=True: Content-Length is None (FastAPI/Starlette StreamingResponse emits Transfer-Encoding: chunked by default). Two pytest files now cover this endpoint: test_admin_docs_export_zip.py (behavior) + test_admin_docs_export_zip_streaming.py (streaming + CNH filter). Frontend downloadDocsZip() reads via resp.blob() which works transparently with chunked transfer. ZIPs verified with zipfile.testzip() — no corruption. Bulkbar testids unchanged: docs-download-all, docs-bulk-download, docs-row-cb-<cpf>, docs-bulkbar.
